mapper.select: SELECT om.order_id as room_id, om.content as content, om.sender_cip as sender_cip, u.first_name as sender_first_name, u.last_name as sender_last_name, om.timestamp_ as timestamp_ FROM ebock.order_message om INNER JOIN ebock.user_ u ON om.sender_cip = u.cip WHERE om.order_id = #{id} ORDER BY timestamp_ ASC

SELECT o.order_id as room_id, o.item_id as item_id, i.name as item_name, i.seller_cip as seller_cip, u.first_name as seller_first_name, u.last_name as seller_last_name, o.buyer_cip as buyer_cip, u2.first_name as buyer_first_name, u2.last_name as buyer_last_name FROM ebock.order_ o INNER JOIN ebock.item i ON i.item_id = o.item_id INNER JOIN ebock.user_ u ON u.cip = i.seller_cip INNER JOIN ebock.user_ u2 ON u2.cip = o.buyer_cip WHERE o.order_id = #{id}

INSERT INTO ebock.order_ (created_at, updated_at, quantity, item_id, buyer_cip) VALUES (NOW(), NOW(), 1, #{itemId}, #{cip}) RETURNING order_id as room_id, item_id, buyer_cip, ( SELECT seller_cip FROM ebock.item WHERE ebock.item.item_id = ebock.order_.item_id );

INSERT INTO ebock.order_message (timestamp_, content, is_read, order_id, sender_cip) VALUES (NOW(), #{content}, false, #{roomId}, #{cip}) RETURNING order_id as room_id, content, sender_cip, ( SELECT u.first_name as sender_first_name FROM ebock.user_ u WHERE u.cip = ebock.order_message.sender_cip ), ( SELECT u.last_name as sender_last_name FROM ebock.user_ u WHERE u.cip = ebock.order_message.sender_cip ), timestamp_;
